arts.ttl: Leeds United could help former Aston Villa defender reignite career after injury hell
arts.sum: Left-back Targett joined Villa from Southampton for a fee in the region of £15m in the summer of 2019 following their promotion to the Premier League under Dean Smith ; he made 89 appearances in a claret and blue shirt, scoring memorable winners against Brighton and Leicester City, the last in the semi-finals of the EFL Cup. He also bagged in a victory at Crystal Palace at the very beginning of Steven Gerrard's reign. Former Aston Villa defender Matt Targett is the subject of an enquiry from promotion chasing Leeds United before the January transfer window deadline on Monday evening, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Club owner publicly confirms he has struck transfer agreement with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Barry scored 15 goals for Stockport County in the first half of this season, but he was recalled by Villa earlier this month with the intention of loaning him out to a club in the second tier. Aston Villa striker Louie Barry will be joining Championship side Hull City and will train with the Tigers this week ahead of their fixture at the weekend, owner Acun Ilicali has confirmed.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix has already given Aston Villa January transfer response
arts.sum: Joao Felix stated his commitment to Chelsea earlier this month, despite his limited playing time at the club since his £45m transfer last summer. Having missed out on signing Felix to Chelsea last summer, Aston Villa are once again targeting him before the January transfer window deadline.

arts.ttl: Celtic join Tammer Bany transfer 'swarm' as Kyogo successor search leads to Randers bargain
arts.sum: The 21-year-old is a player in demand this month with the Hoops in search of some more firepower

arts.ttl: What Celtic need to automatically qualify for Champions League last 16 – 7 results that must unfold
arts.sum: The Hoops are already guaranteed a place in the play-offs but there's an outside chance of finishing in the top eight

arts.ttl: 'They've spoke': Chelsea have asked for £80m Aston Villa player in swap deal for Joao Felix and Axel Disasi
arts.sum: Yesterday saw two Chelsea players who have been on the fringes of the starting side linked with a move to the same Premier League club....

arts.ttl: Aston Villa decision to be confirmed 'in the coming days' as Unai Emery transfer stance emerges
arts.sum: Mosquera, who is currently away representing Colombia under 20s at the South American U20 Championships, has spent the first half of this season at Real Union, the Spanish club with strong links to Unai Emery. Aston Villa defender Yeimar Mosquera is in line to return to the club this month, according to the player's agent.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix to Aston Villa transfer latest and the issue with Chelsea to be resolved
arts.sum: Felix, who Emery has admired for a long time, is also of interest again, but Premier League rules state that clubs can only loan one player from a top flight rival in the same window - meaning Villa can't loan both players this month. Disasi is a player who has reportedly agreed personal terms with Villa ahead of a loan move which isn't likely to have a permanent option.

arts.ttl: Hull City owner Acun Ilicali has say on pursuit of Aston Villa ace Louie Barry
arts.sum: Hull City owner Acun Ilicali has said they are ‘very, very close’ to sealing their proposed loan deal… The post Hull City owner Acun Ilicali has say on pursuit of Aston Villa ace Louie Barry appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Aston Villa interested in finalising double January deal?
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly attracting interest from a Premier League rival for one of their backup forwards.
